item.g:title: SoundArc Noir Elite
item.g:description: The flagship SoundArc experience. Hand-assembled with aerospace-grade aluminum, genuine leather ear cups, and our most advanced ANC system. For those who accept no compromise.

item.g:title: SoundArc Air Lite
item.g:description: Lightweight wireless on-ear headphones with 25-hour battery, Bluetooth 5.3, and a minimalist design inspired by Apple's iconic aesthetic. Perfect for everyday listening.

item.g:title: SoundArc Studio S3
item.g:description: Professional studio headphones engineered for accuracy and warmth. Foldable design, detachable cable, and premium memory foam ear cushions for extended sessions.

item.g:title: SoundArc Pro X1
item.g:description: Premium over-ear headphones with Hi-Res Audio certification, 40kHz frequency response, and adaptive noise cancellation. 30-hour battery life with quick-charge support.
